evals.prompt: Can this branch merge? It changes the operator, gateway policy, and CLI docs.
evals.expected_output: A release-readiness plan that scopes the diff, routes to qa-e2e-operations, security-audit or qa-e2e-security, and repo-guidance-sync, then reports required CI parity and live cluster gates before giving a go/no-go decision.
assertions: Inspects branch status and changed surfaces before choosing checks
Routes each surface to the relevant repo-local skill
Does not claim readiness without required gate results or explicit blockers

evals.prompt: Prepare this commit for a release tag and tell me whether it is safe to ship.
evals.expected_output: A release-readiness report that requires CI parity, full Kind e2e or verified CI, security/supply-chain checks, docs/release-note review, and exact commit/version evidence before a go/no-go decision.
assertions: Requires release candidate identity such as commit, version, and target mode
Includes full E2E or verified CI evidence for release readiness
Includes security, supply-chain, docs, and known-limitation checks when applicable

evals.prompt: Run a canary readiness pass for a dashboard change before we promote it.
evals.expected_output: A canary-readiness pass that coordinates qa-e2e-ui browser evidence, qa-e2e-operations rollout and doctor checks, smoke-auth/governance traffic, changed image/version evidence, and rollback instructions.
assertions: Requires browser evidence for UI-visible behavior
Collects rollout, cluster doctor, and ingress traffic evidence
Includes rollback plan and blocks promotion if live evidence is unavailable
